narrative:
Precinct Wintringer (precinct in Jefferson County) has 340 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
